text: % EC2 Categories @ st @ s e General Purpose - Default - Diverse workloads, equal resource ratio. e Compute Optimized - Media Processing, HPC, Scientific Modelling, gaming, Machine Learning. e Memory Optimized - Processing large in-memory datasets, some database workloads. e Accelerated Computing - Hardware GPU, field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). e Storage Optimized - Sequential and Random IO - scale-out transactional databases, data warehousing, Elasticsearch, analytics workloads.
